steps.title: Write the polynomial in factored form
steps.content:
Since the zeros of $h(x)$ are $-4$, $5$, and $9$, the polynomial factors as:
$$h(x) = (x + 4)(x - 5)(x - 9)$$

steps.title: The constant term equals h(0)
steps.content:
In the standard form $h(x) = x^3 + ax^2 + bx + c$, the constant $c = h(0)$. Substitute $x = 0$ into the factored form:
$$c = (0 + 4)(0 - 5)(0 - 9) = 4 \cdot (-5) \cdot (-9)$$
